creator: marco@crowdsec.net
text:
Created attachment 245023
patch for crowdsec 1.5.4

Upstream changes are in the github release pages.

This version of the port applies vendor dependencies as a separate file, and builds with the re2 C++ library to improve performance when parsing logs. Service management is more resilient with a timeout in case the application is not responsive to a termination signal. A new notification plugin for sentinel is included.
